failures.description: The agent failed when it misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result and produced an answer inconsistent with the evidence: it reported 9 options and a fabricated record instead of the 2 returned items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned count=2 with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762, prices 655.59 and 622.12. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer that contradicts that output by saying there are 9 options and citing record 0000000000. This is not a missing-information issue or invalid tool invocation; it is incorrect reasoning/synthesis from the tool result.
